channel.title: Web on Professional Beginner
channel.description: Recent content in Web on Professional Beginner

item.title: Static vs Relative
item.description: Recently I have been dedicating some time to the study of the fundamentals of HTML and CSS. A couple of days ago I wrote a blog post on my very first Front-End Kata.

item.title: Background Image With Rounded Corners
item.description: Recently I have been dedicating some time to the study of the fundamentals of HTML and CSS. A couple of days ago I wrote a blog post on my very first Front-End Kata.

item.title: My First Front-End Kata
item.description: I recently decided to brush up my Front-End skills, in parts because I want to rebuild this blog from the ground up, but also simply because it is a thing I have meant to do for a very long time. And now is the perfect time 😊
